docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-13-2026 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-13-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-13-2026 BY VISTING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. PLAINTIFF JOHN POTTEBAUM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANTHONY KOPP IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARCIA SITCOSKE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOHN TRUE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POTTEBAUM, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOPP, ANTHONY SITCOSKE, MARCIA $219.75 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $294.75 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $219.75 FILED BY POTTEBAUM, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT KOPP, ANTHONY SITCOSKE, MARCIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-13-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
